title: Vineyard registry plugin entry
description: One row in community-plugins.json. LEAN catalog projection (Obsidian model): the full manifest lives in the author repo at repo@ref/path; derived fields let the browse page render without fetching every manifest.

identifier.description: Reverse-DNS PK; equals manifest.identifier. Unique across the whole registry.

description.description: <=250 chars, sentence case, ends with a period, no emoji.

repo.description: owner/name GitHub path; the only pointer to code.

ref.description: IMMUTABLE: 40-char commit SHA or annotated tag = manifest.version. Branches rejected.

version.description: SemVer mirror of manifest.version at this ref.

platforms.description: DERIVED badge set from platforms.{web,desktop} + web.runtime.

scopes_summary.description: DERIVED neutral facets for filtering (NOT warnings). No special 'destructive' treatment by product decision.

graph_write.description: true if any node:/edge: create/update/delete verb is present.

secret_config.description: true if any scopes.config has secret:true (=> desktop-only key).

compat.description: Oldest Vineyard runtime this entry's ref supports (versions.json analog).

plugin_count.description: DERIVED: number of plugins bundled when the identifier names a PACK (one file â†’ many plugins, Â§3.4). Omitted (or 1) for a single-plugin entry. The marketplace shows the pack as one card and installs all contained plugins together.

verified.description: Mirror of verified-authors.json membership; set by CI, not self-asserted.
